title: Creamy Quick Fix Asian Couscous Stir-fry
description: A quick and creamy Polish dish featuring couscous in a savory sauce made with dairy-free friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: soy sauce or tamari soy sauce

instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring vegetable broth or water to a boil.
Add quinoa and couscous to the boiling liquid. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 5 minutes until fully cooked.
Drain excess liquid from the quinoa and couscous, then mix them with 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large bowl.
In a separate pan over medium-high heat, add minced garlic, soy sauce or tamari soy sauce, ginger, and red pepper flakes (if using). Stir until fragrant.
Pour the cooked quinoa and couscous mixture into the pan with garlic sauce. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly coated.
Garnish with soaked cashews and a sprinkle of sesame seeds before serving.
